content.text:
All 8 active tests pass and 1 todo remains. The block pattern test passes without any code change because the existing implementation already correctly handles still-life patterns through the survival rule (each cell in the block has exactly 3 live neighbors).

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: No code change needed
- Result: All tests pass (8 passing, 1 todo)
- Approach: The block pattern is a still life because each of the 4 cells has exactly 3 live neighbors, satisfying the survival condition (neighborCount === 2 || neighborCount === 3). No dead cells adjacent to the block have exactly 3 live neighbors, so no births occur. The existing rules handle this naturally.
